title: FinSense AI
summary: AI underwriting assistant that helps finance teams approve deals faster.
overview: FinSense AI streamlines loan underwriting with document intelligence, risk scoring, and analyst workflows in one workspace.
challenges: Underwriters spent hours reconciling documents across legacy systems.
Risk models were opaque and hard to tune per product line.
Compliance reviews lacked a single source of truth.
solution: We delivered a RAG-powered underwriting copilot with policy-aware scoring, audit trails, and CRM integrations for relationship managers.
architectureNote: Microservices on AWS with document pipelines, model inference workers, and a secure API layer for bank integrations.
